title: FAIR Data Schema Entity Types CV
description: A controlled vocabulary for categorizing entities (individuals, organizations, projects, software) that contribute to a resource. Each entry provides a canonical URI for use in 'fair:typeRef'.

Individual.description: A single person or individual. Aligned with 'prov:Person' and 'schema:Person'.

Organization.description: An organized body of people with a particular purpose, such as a business, government agency, or NGO. Aligned with 'prov:Organization' and 'schema:Organization'.

Project.description: A specific organized effort or initiative within or across organizations. Aligned with 'schema:Project' and DDI concept of 'Project'.

Software.description: A running software process, script, or automated agent. Aligned with 'prov:SoftwareAgent' and 'schema:SoftwareApplication'.

Agent.description: An autonomous AI-powered agent, tool, or large language model (LLM) acting as a contributor. Aligned with 'prov:SoftwareAgent'.

Other.description: Any other type of entity not covered by the standard categories.
